title: elymus × gouldii
intro: Elymus × gouldii, also known as a hybrid of the Elymus glaucus and the Elymus caninus, is a type of grass that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elymus × gouldii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Elymus × gouldii can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
